nasb.text: and he had in his hand a little book which was open. He placed his right foot on the sea and his left on the land;

esv.text: He had a little scroll open in his hand. And he set his right foot on the sea, and his left foot on the land,

cnv.text: 手裡拿著展開的小書卷。他的右腳踏在海上，左腳踏在地上，

ccb.text: 手中拿着一卷打开了的小书卷，右脚踏在海中，左脚踏在地上。

csbs.text: 手里拿着一个打开的小书卷。他右脚踩在海上，左脚踩在地上，
